description_long: This is a female police officer dressed in a standard blue patrol uniform, featuring a short-sleeved button-up shirt with gold buttons, a visible badge on the left chest, and matching blue pants. She wears a blue peaked cap adorned with a gold police emblem at the front, and her uniform includes a black utility belt equipped with several pouches and tools. The officer has dark curly hair, gold hoop earrings, and a friendly facial expression. The shirt has shoulder epaulets and a nameplate, while the pants are fitted and have back pockets. The shoes are black and polished, complementing the professional appearance. The overall look is that of a city patrol officer ready for duty in an urban environment.
description: A female police officer in a blue patrol uniform with a peaked cap, utility belt, and gold badge, exuding a professional and approachable presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's face, gold badge, nameplate, shirt details, and utility belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the officer's profile, cap shape, hair volume, and side pouches on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cap, hair, shirt, and pants with visible back pockets.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the officer's profile, belt equipment, and sleeve details.
attribute_uniform_type: Short-sleeved blue patrol shirt with gold buttons and badge, matching blue pants, black utility belt, and black shoes; standard city police patrol attire.
attribute_headgear_style: Blue peaked cap with a gold police emblem at the front.
